rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Donald Harris
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, January 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m. KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Donald Harris. Hearing required. The Court has not received courtesy copies of the moving papers. = (220/HEK)
